top_signals.title: US Tech Rebounds, Traders On Yen Intervention Watch  | The Asia Trade 6/30/2026
top_signals.summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Yen hits 39-year low of 162 per dollar: 5 things to know
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Taiwan opposition pitches $7.5 billion drone plan after stalling government bid
top_signals.summary: The debate is being closely watched because use of unmanned systems elsewhere has shown how the technology can be leveraged to defend against larger adversaries.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
